transitions.trigger: document added to approved Document Graph
required_inputs check fails — Gap Report emitted
all required_inputs present AND upstream dependencies approved
user provides missing input OR chooses option B (provisional hypothesis)
self-validation passes — document presented to user
user requests changes — back to generation
new version of document approved — previous version archived

rules.on_max_failures: Stop generation. Surface to user with full context. Request human review.
rules.downstream_propagation: Documents may only use upstream documents in 'approved' state as sources.
rules.draft_reuse: Documents in any state other than 'approved' must not be used as canonical sources.
rules.supersession: When a document is superseded, all downstream documents that referenced it must be flagged for re-validation.

corpus_states.in_progress: At least one document is in a non-terminal state
corpus_states.blocked: At least one document is in blocked_missing_inputs state with no pending action
corpus_states.complete: All planned documents are in approved state
corpus_states.partial: Some documents approved, some not_planned — intentional partial corpus
